title: MIA in 30
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] MIA in 3.0             Quote Post by weeminator24 » Fri Jan 11, 2013 12:51 am Three threads merged together to satisfy this OP, which was unfortunately bumped to the second page as a result: Guy Nacks wrote: Discussion of what we believe the fates of the supporting cast to be, namely: Kaji, Toji, Kensuke, Hikari and Pen-Pen.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jan 11, 2013 1:00 am Well, Takeo knows him which probably implies Takeo himself is some sort of military guy, but that's it. Either he's dead and that's the reason why Misato became this... person she is now, or we'll see him in "Final" in that "place of hope". But if he's alive, it's hard to think that he wouldn't be affilated with WILLE somehow, maybe he's the keeper of their base, or he's the leader of a human colony. Him being dead seems like the most likely option, though. Mostly because it explains Misato. I mean, can you see her becoming corrupted and cold if she was in happy relationship with her highshool sweatheart? Because they seemed as good as back together by the time Bardiel rolled around, so something must have... stopped them. He seemed very much alive during TI itself, but maybe the struggles afterwards killed him. Maybe he was killed in the events surrounding the defection of Misato & co from NERV.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jan 11, 2013 1:45 am He lives in a small wooden shack in Wunder's basement, in which he hoards chewed gum stolen from Misato's wastebasket.

[]: [SPOILERS] Shinji's shirt text             Quote Post by Cloud7896 » Fri Jan 11, 2013 5:17 am Can anyone tell what's was the text on the Shinji's shirt when he wears it?He made a such shocked face but i can't figure out why...

[]:             Quote Post by Oral Stage » Fri Jan 11, 2013 5:29 am I only know the kana but I can tell you that the last word on the label was Touji so I'm guessing the Kanji at the start said Suzuhara.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaBrothers » Fri Jan 11, 2013 5:40 am ... Toji's shirt? :(

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jan 11, 2013 5:49 am It's also been noted that Shinji sees Touji's name tag inside a white shirt that's a bit large for him.

[]:             Quote Post by Cloud7896 » Fri Jan 11, 2013 6:04 am Yeah that was the only thing that i thougt it can be...but i was not sure,thanks now i'm sure

[]:             Quote Post by Oral Stage » Fri Jan 11, 2013 6:18 am I suppose Gendou had Fuyutski raid Touji's wardrobe at some point

[]:             Quote Post by A.T. Fish » Fri Jan 11, 2013 8:11 am Ah thanks, I was wondering about it too, I paused the movie in this scene and began to try and guess what was written there, Suzuhara was the obvious guess but I was expecting to be proven wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jan 11, 2013 8:23 am weeminator24 wrote: I recently watched 3.0, and I can't help but wonder.....what happened to Kaji? He's mentioned once toward the beginning of the film, but after that...

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Jan 11, 2013 2:48 pm Yeah I was confused about this too. I guess this is supposed to help communicate that Touji, Kensuke, the class president etc. are all dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Fri Jan 11, 2013 3:20 pm I'm not too sure about Toji being dead, Sakura was pretty kind to Shinji. If Toji was dead I'd expect her to be colder towards him, but then again she could just be a super loving, kind person. However, I think Toji being alive is more likely.

[]:             Quote Post by Cloud7896 » Fri Jan 11, 2013 3:37 pm June wrote: I'm not too sure about Toji being dead, Sakura was pretty kind to Shinji. If Toji was dead I'd expect her to be colder towards him, but then again she could just be a super loving, kind person. However, I think Toji being alive is more likely.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Fri Jan 11, 2013 4:25 pm June wrote: I'm not too sure about Toji being dead, Sakura was pretty kind to Shinji. If Toji was dead I'd expect her to be colder towards him, but then again she could just be a super loving, kind person. However, I think Toji being alive is more likely.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Jan 11, 2013 4:30 pm Touji and Kagi both get mentioned in terms that by no means imply that they are not alive.

[]:             Quote Post by LIwarriorTKD » Fri Jan 11, 2013 4:59 pm yea the characters are definitely Touji's name... Seriously Anno, take Touji and the rest for all I care but you better not have taken Pen Pen too. I don't know if I could ever forgive Shinji for that lol what is the average lifespan of the average warm water penguin anyway...?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 11, 2013 6:05 pm The name tag clearly reads 鈴原 トウジ LIwarriorTKD wrote: what is the average lifespan of the average warm water penguin anyway...?

[]: What was written on Shinji's shirt?             Quote Post by tabris17 » Fri Jan 11, 2013 6:07 pm The morning after Shinji and Kaworu are done star-gazing, Shinji is preparing for the day when his new shirt comes in. He puts it on while wondering, "I wonder if it's still noticeable..." and sees a stitching (name tag?) inside his shirt. After reading it, his pupils dilate (his new trademark). Anyone know what the shirt said? I'm guessing it might have been an older classmate's shirt...?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jan 11, 2013 6:12 pm 鈴原 トウジ
